title: Add TaqniX to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [TaqniX](https://taqnix.hexabizsolutions.cloud) to business
- Transforms a WhatsApp number into an automated sales channel that manages the full restaurant ordering lifecycle—greeting, menu browsing, OTP confirmation, and kitchen dispatch for TaqniX.

Fixes #9984

gist.headline: TaqniX joins the hive
gist.blurb: TaqniX just landed in the greenhouse! They've built a slick WhatsApp bot that handles the entire restaurant ordering lifecycle—from greeting to kitchen dispatch.
gist.summary: Added TaqniX to the community apps showcase, featuring their WhatsApp-based automated sales channel for restaurant ordering.
gist.impact: The community can now explore how TaqniX manages the full restaurant ordering lifecycle—including menu browsing, OTP confirmation, and kitchen dispatch—directly through WhatsApp.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a WhatsApp restaurant ordering bot (TaqniX). Visuals should include a restaurant/kitchen setting, a smartphone with chat bubbles (WhatsApp metaphor), and food. Polly the bee should be interacting with this, perhaps wearing a chef's hat or holding a smartphone taking an order.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny chef's hat, holding a smartphone with green chat bubbles. In the background, a warm, bustling pixelated restaurant kitchen with glowing ovens and fresh food. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
